release_notes: Standardized Dropdowns & Smart Input Controls: Select/SearchableSelect/MultiSelect/ReasonSelect + desktop/utils/option_lists.py catalogs wired across void, consumption, stock adjust, POS payments, roles, customer type, product status, dashboard/reports date presets. Free-text only for notes and Other→Please Specify. Preserves AutoFill/State Reset 2.3.57, Cash Rounding 2.3.53, Payment Variance, Consumption. No Setup/GitHub Release publish.
